title: Website : https://mcmichael.com/event/sandra-brewster-fish/
location_text: Ontario This spring: Using drawing and photo-based gel transfer techniques, Toronto bas
description_text: Apr - Jul 12 - 5 EXHIBITION: Sandra Brewster: FISH April 12th, 2025 10:00 am to July 5th, 2026 5:00 pm 10365 Islington Avenue , Kleinburg , Ontario This spring: Using drawing and photo-based gel transfer techniques, Toronto based Sandra Brewster’s installation will depict the Essequibo River in Guyana and its distinctive fish species, evoking the fluidity and dynamism of water as a metaphor for migration and transformation. Sandra Brewster is a Canadian artist whose work explores the nuanced interplay between identity and environment. Her multidisciplinary practice—spanning drawing, photography, and sculpture—examines the lived experiences of movement and migration, often using gel transfer techniques to create textured, layered surfaces that reflect the unfixed, dynamic nature of diasporic identity. Brewster’s installation offers a transformative, relational perspective on land, water, and history—one rooted in the diasporic experience. Sandra Brewster: FISH is presented in partnership with CONTACT Photography Festival. Saturday, April 12th, 2025 at 10 AM to Sunday, July 5th, 2026 at 5 PM 10365 Islington Avenue Kleinburg , Vaughan Ontario L0J 1C0 View Map to EXHIBITION: Sandra Brewster: FISH Cost pricing available online Website : https://mcmichael.com/event/sandra-brewster-fish/ E-mail : info@mcmichael.com (905) 893-1121 Facebook YouTube Twitter Instagram

title: Website : https://mcmichael.com/event/early-days-indigenous-art-at-the-mcmichael/?utm_campaign=EarlyDays2025&utm_medium=post&utm_source=CCT
location_text: Ontario After a landmark international tour, Early Days: Indigenous Art at the McMichae
description_text: Sep - Jul 20 - 5 EXHIBITION Early Days: Indigenous Art at the McMichael September 20th, 2025 12:00 am to July 5th, 2026 11:59 pm 10365 Islington Avenue , Kleinburg , Ontario After a landmark international tour, Early Days: Indigenous Art at the McMichael returns to the McMichael Canadian Art Collection. First presented in 2020-2021, this critically acclaimed exhibition has become a defining exploration of the depth, diversity, and vitality of Indigenous art in Canada. This re-presented version is expanded including new and never before exhibited works. Organized in close collaboration with Indigenous artists, scholars, and knowledge keepers, Early Days presents more than 100 works from the McMichael's permanent collection. Works on view span over two centuries- from 18th-century ceremonial regalia and trade items to the groundbreaking work of artists from the 1960s through the 1980s, and powerful contemporary pieces by leading voices today. The exhibition showcases work by Norval Morrisseau, Robert Houle, Carl Beam, Alex Janvier, Shelly Niro, Faye HeavyShield, Rebecca Belmore, Kent Monkman, Meryl McMaster, and many others. Their works—including painting, sculpture, printmaking, textile, and video— reveal the cultural continuity, resilience, and innovation of Indigenous artistic practices across generations. Saturday, September 20th, 2025 at Midnight to Sunday, July 5th, 2026 at

title: Website : https://mcmichael.com/event/artful-yoga-at-the-mcmichael-2025-11-22/2026-01-10/
location_text: Ontario Unwind with a restorative morning yoga session at the McMichael with views over
description_text: Apr 4 Sat +11 dates Artful Yoga at the McMichael April 4th, 2026 9:00 am to 10:00 am 10365 Islington Avenue , Kleinburg , Ontario Unwind with a restorative morning yoga session at the McMichael with views over the Humber River Valley. Registered Yoga Teacher Rina Morra will lead gentle sessions of Vinyasa flow yoga to awaken the mind and body. Participants are asked to arrive and check in 20 minutes prior to the beginning of each session. Class will be held in Gallery 8. Open to all skill levels. No prior yoga experience necessary. Please note that this program is only open to participants aged 16 and over. title: Website : https://mcmichael.com/event/artwell-accessible-program-for-individuals-living-with-dementia/2026-01-11/
location_text: Ontario The Artwell program is developed and delivered in partnership with the Alzheime
description_text: Apr 12 Sun +2 dates Artwell - Accessible Program for Individuals Living with Dementia April 12th, 2026 11:00 am to 1:00 pm 10365 Islington Avenue , Kleinburg , Ontario The Artwell program is developed and delivered in partnership with the Alzheimer Society of York Region. Artwell is a series of interactive artmaking programs that supports emotional connections, encouraging memory recall, experimentation, and gentle social interaction among individuals living with dementia. The visual arts and music are recognized as having therapeutic benefits for individuals living with dementia. Viewing and creating art allows participants to focus on their capabilities instead of focusing on what they can no longer achieve. The goal of the program is to reduce isolation and instill a sense of purpose while providing a memorable cultural experience and an opportunity to strengthen bonds between participants and caregivers. Each two-hour session is offered monthly. Each session is facilitated by two McMichael Educators and up to two volunteers. Registration is required. Sunday, April 12th, 2026 11 AM to 1 PM Sunday, May 10th, 2026 11 AM to 1 PM Sunday, June 7th, 2026 11 AM to 1 PM 10365 Islington Avenue Kleinburg , Vaughan Ontario L0J 1C0 View Map to Artwell - Accessible Program for Individuals Living with Dementia Website : https://mcmichael.com/event/artwell-accessible-program-for-individual

title: Website : https://calendar.trca.ca/event/ontario-naturalist-level-1-course/
when_text: Apr 12 Sun Ontario Naturalist Level 1 Course April 12th, 2026
location_text: Ontario Naturalist Level 1 Course April 12th, 2026 12:00 pm to 8:00 pm 9550 Pine Valley
description_text: Apr 12 Sun Ontario Naturalist Level 1 Course April 12th, 2026 12:00 pm to 8:00 pm 9550 Pine Valley Drive , Woodbridge , Ontario Learn a vast array of naturalist skills from experts in the field. This blended learning course, targeted at budding or amateur naturalists, combines in-class, hands-on instruction and self-paced online learning. In this course, you will learn species identification, ecological significance, memory aids, and threats to local flora and fauna. This newfound knowledge will help you experience the natural world in a whole new way. This course has a maximum cohort of 20 students to ensure high quality, individualized learning. Select modules in this certification course are also available as individually priced workshops (registration coming soon). Module 1: Natural Connections: Helping Others Develop a Lifelong Relationship with Nature Module 2: Reptiles of Ontario Module 3: Amphibians of Ontario (online) Module 4: Introduction to Birds of Ontario Module 5: Natural History of Southern Ontario (online) Module 6: Mammal ID and Tracking (online) Module 7: Fish Identification Module 8: Birds of Prey Module 9: Wildflower and Tree Identification Module 10: Butterflies of Ontario Module 11: Bees Module 12: Dragonflies and Damselflies Sunday, April 12th, 2026 Noon to 8 PM 9550 Pine Valley Drive Woodbridge , Vaughan Ontario L4H 4Z2 View Map to Ontario Naturalist Le

title: Website : https://mcmichael.com/event/mothers-day-chocolate-workshop-and-tour/
location_text: Ontario Celebrate Mother’s Day at the McMichael with a hands-on chocolate experience in
description_text: May 2 Sat Mother's Day Chocolate Workshop and Tour May 2nd, 2026 2:00 pm to 4:00 pm 10365 Islington Avenue , Kleinburg , Ontario Celebrate Mother’s Day at the McMichael with a hands-on chocolate experience in an inspiring setting. Start with an immersive 60-minute workshop led by award-winning chocolatiers from Succulent Chocolates & Sweets. Hand-paint four chocolate bar molds using vibrant cocoa butter colours, then cast and finish your creations with a curated selection of toppings — crafting chocolate bars that are as personal as they are beautiful. The experience also includes a guided tasting of four single-origin chocolates from four countries, plus two artisan chocolates enjoyed during the session. After the workshop, continue the celebration with a guided tour of Old Growth: Masterworks by the Group of Seven and their Contemporaries, a sweeping exhibition showcasing some of the McMichael’s most iconic and enduring treasures. Saturday, May 2nd, 2026 2 PM to 4 PM 10365 Islington Avenue Kleinburg , Vaughan Ontario L0J 1C0 View Map to Mother's Day Chocolate Workshop and Tour Cost $150 for the General Public, $130 for McMichael Members Website : https://mcmichael.com/event/mothers-day-chocolate-workshop-and-tour/ E-mail : programs@mcmichael.com (905) 893 Facebook Instagram

title: Website : https://calendar.trca.ca/event/fathers-day-at-kortright/
when_text: Jun 21 Sun Father’s Day at Kortright June 21st, 2026 10
location_text: Woodbridge , Ontario Celebrate Dad with a Day of Outdoor Adventure! This Father’s Day, ste
description_text: Jun 21 Sun Father’s Day at Kortright June 21st, 2026 10:00 am to 3:00 pm 9550 Pine Valley Drive , Woodbridge , Ontario Celebrate Dad with a Day of Outdoor Adventure! This Father’s Day, step away from the hustle and reconnect with nature at Kortright! We’ve crafted a fun, hands-on day for families to explore the great outdoors together. Activities Include: Fire Building – Learn the basics of fire safety and try your hand at building and lighting a fire (with supervision, of course!). Shelter Building – Test your wilderness skills by constructing a shelter using natural materials. Pond Dipping – Grab a net and discover the amazing creatures that live in our pond habitat. Orienteering Challenge – Navigate the landscape using a map and compass in a fun course suitable for all ages. Natural Playscape – Kids can let their imaginations run wild in our nature-based play area. Pack a Picnic! Bring along your favourite picnic lunch to enjoy! Leisurely Trail Walks Take a peaceful stroll along our trails and enjoy the fresh air, bird songs, and maybe even spot some wildlife! Whether Dad’s a seasoned adventurer or just loves a good walk in the woods, this is the perfect way to spend time together and make some unforgettable memories. Sunday, June 21st, 2026 10 AM to 3 PM 9550 Pine Valley Drive Woodbridge , Vaughan Ontario L4H 4Z2 View Map to Father’s Day at Kortright Website : https://calen
